TallyPrime workflow alternative

A TallyPrime alternative for reducing daily accounts entry work.

TallyPrime is powerful accounting software. Fastbooks takes a different angle: help owners, staff and accountants capture daily transactions faster, prepare accounting entry drafts, and review them before final posting.

Get Early Access on WhatsApp

We respect your privacy. Message opens directly in WhatsApp; no info is saved on this site.

See WhatsApp accounting

Direct answer

Is Fastbooks a TallyPrime alternative?

Fastbooks is not positioned as a direct TallyPrime replacement. It is an accounts entry preparation layer for Indian businesses that want to reduce manual voucher entry. Businesses can capture bills, receipts, voice notes and bank rows in Fastbooks, then review prepared sales, purchase, expense and bank entries before final posting.

  • Keep accountant control.
  • Reduce daily manual data entry.
  • Capture business activity before context is lost.

Workflow difference

Keep accountant control. Reduce manual entry.

NeedTraditional Tally-style workflowFastbooks workflow
Daily captureOpen software and type vouchers manually.Send bill photos, voice notes, receipts or bank rows.
Entry preparationStaff or accountant selects party, ledger, amount, narration and GST.Fastbooks prepares draft sales, purchase, expense and bank entries.
ReviewCorrections happen after entries are typed.Accountant reviews before approval and final posting.
Best fitStrong statutory accounting and familiar CA workflow.Faster front-office capture and review-ready accounts preparation.

Who should consider this

For businesses where accounting entry is a daily bottleneck.

Owners who hate data entry

Capture transaction context quickly instead of remembering it later.

Accountants with many clients

Receive cleaner draft entries and focus on review instead of typing everything.

Teams already using Tally-like systems

Use Fastbooks as a preparation layer without positioning it as a reckless replacement for review.

Example workflow

From bank narration to review-ready receipt draft.

A business receives “NEFT RECEIVED SHARMA TRADERS ₹85,000.” Instead of manually creating a receipt voucher later, Fastbooks can prepare a draft receipt entry with party and invoice match suggestions for accountant review.

FAQ

TallyPrime alternative questions

Is Fastbooks a TallyPrime replacement?

Fastbooks should not be positioned as a direct TallyPrime replacement at this stage. It is better understood as an accounts entry preparation layer that captures bills, receipts, voice notes and bank rows, then prepares drafts for accountant review.

Why would a business need Fastbooks if it already uses TallyPrime?

Many businesses still struggle with daily voucher entry, bill capture, narration, bank receipts and party matching. Fastbooks targets this capture-and-prepare layer so accountants can review cleaner draft entries.

Can accountants use Fastbooks with their existing workflow?

Yes. The intended workflow is accountant-friendly: Fastbooks prepares accounting entry drafts, but humans review before final posting.
